Home / Services / Framing Services

Framing Services

Solid framing for new construction, additions, and renovations.

The frame is the backbone of any structure. II Brothers Carpentry provides expert framing services for new construction, additions, and renovations in Mesa and the surrounding areas. Whether you're building a new home in Eastmark or adding a room to your existing property, we ensure that your framing is structurally sound and built to last. We understand the importance of proper framing, especially in Arizona's climate, where extreme temperatures and monsoon season can put stress on a building's structure.

We use high-quality lumber and construction techniques to ensure that your framing is strong, straight, and level. We adhere to all local building codes and regulations, ensuring that your project is safe and compliant. We work closely with architects and engineers to ensure that the framing meets their specifications. We handle all types of framing, including wood framing, steel framing, and post-and-beam framing. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that every connection is secure and every angle is precise. From initial layout to final inspection, we provide comprehensive framing services that give you peace of mind. We ensure proper insulation and sealing to combat Mesa's extreme heat.

Our Process

  1. 01 Planning: Review blueprints and specifications.
  2. 02 Layout: Precise layout and marking.
  3. 03 Framing: Expert construction of walls, floors, and roofs.
  4. 04 Inspection: Ensure structural integrity and code compliance.

Benefits

  • Structural integrity
  • Code compliance
  • Long-lasting durability
  • Accurate dimensions

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of lumber do you use for framing?

We use high-quality lumber that meets or exceeds all local building codes and regulations.

Are you licensed and insured?

Yes, we are fully licensed and insured to provide framing services in Arizona.

How long does framing take?

The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide a realistic estimate during the consultation.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with framing services? Contact us today.
